programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: David Bromstad helps a woman buy her first home in Cape Girardeau, MO, with her $1 million winnings.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: After years of moving around for his medical training, a young doctor is ready to put down roots in Philadelphia.

programme.title: Flip Or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina come across an intriguing short sale listing in the desirable neighbourhood of Torrance.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: A Canadian family realizes their lifelong dream of living the European life in Amsterdam.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A motorcycle racer and his wife buy their first home in his California hometown.

programme.title: First Time Fixer
programme.desc: A mum puts her son's woodworking talents to the test by enlisting him to help her renovate their new midcentury family home in Washington state.

programme.title: First Time Fixer
programme.desc: A couple with minimal renovation experience races against a six month deadline to take on a historic home in Columbus, Georgia.

programme.title: Married To Real Estate
programme.desc: A couple that has inherited a childhood home wants to turn it into a short-term rental property. Egypt and Mike transform it into a dream bungalow.

programme.title: The Flipping El Moussas
programme.desc: With permits stalling progress and the house getting robbed, Heather sources materials from their other flips to make up for unexpected costs.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: An artistic couple leaves city life to pursue their passions in laid-back Norfolk Island, Australia.

programme.desc: A Greenville, South Carolina, family of six wants to move from their small townhouse into something bigger.

programme.desc: A couple looks to leave bustling Bentonville, Arkansas, for a quieter setting outside of town.

programme.title: House Hunters: Amazing Water Homes
programme.desc: A family of seven is ready to fulfil their dream of living on the water on Long Island's Merrick, New York. But finding a place is a challenge.

programme.title: House Hunters: Amazing Water Homes
programme.desc: After living in Seattle, a couple wants a place on the water in Honolulu. Are they both willing to make compromises to find a home they both love?

programme.desc: Tarek and Heather get an insider deal from Tarek's mum on a house in Anaheim Hills, but it quickly becomes a greater venture than they expected.

programme.title: First Time Fixer
programme.desc: Best friends return to flip a friend's rental in beautiful Park City, Utah.With some help from Chip and Jo, the girls take on a new set of challenges.

programme.desc: A successful Connecticut mum tackles her first fixer and hopes it will empower her daughter to feel like she can do anything.

programme.title: Rock The Block
programme.desc: Four teams of design superstars create gorgeous kitchens and living rooms as the ultimate home renovation competition kicks off.

programme.title: Selling The Big Easy
programme.desc: Brittany crosses Lake Pontchartrain to find a family of four's perfect home in a kid-friendly neighbourhood.

programme.title: Selling The Big Easy
programme.desc: Brittany assists a working mother with finding an Uptown property that she can enjoy with her daughter and have space to rent out.

programme.title: Celebrity Iou
programme.desc: Ray Romano teams up with Jonathan and Drew to gift his friend and assistant of 23 years with a spa-like upgrade to her main suite.

programme.title: Home Town Kickstart
programme.desc: Page Turner, Carmine Sabatella, Mike Pyle and Russell Holmes help make a Louisiana town more welcoming, with a community centre that honours the past.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses
programme.desc: Lyndsay and Leslie undertake a 1950s rambler with a rough exterior. But the home's proximity to a new sewer system triggers a series of problems.

programme.desc: Tarek and Christina find a mid-century property in Placentia, Calif., that is dated, but has a desirable size and layout.

programme.desc: A social media influencer is looking for a quirky place to call home in Orange County, California. Her at-home business needs are a priority.

programme.desc: Christina receives an e-mail from an agent who has a listing in the South Bay neighbourhood of Hawthorne.

programme.desc: A woman wants to find a cabin in Hudson, NY. She wants room for her dog to run, and a short train commute to the city.

programme.desc: Chip and Jo focus on custom millwork styled to match the home's mid-century modern origins and add a water feature to the courtyard.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: The Lakehouse
programme.desc: Chip and Jo merge mid-century modern and Spanish revival design styles with unique tiles and custom metal details in the bathroom and recreation room.

programme.title: Neighborhood Watch
programme.desc: The doorbell camera becomes an interactive tool for comedic communication when friends, neighbours, and strangers talk to the camera.

programme.title: Neighborhood Watch
programme.desc: In the past, children's behaviour and parental failures were private, but when your house records everything, moments of disbelief get put on display.

programme.desc: After nine years of medical school, a newly qualified doctor and his wife search for their Alabama dream home.

programme.desc: Mike and Carmine take a little inspiration from nature and convert a family's home into a California Craftsman with an organic edge.

programme.desc: Brittany balances a family's specific tastes to find them the laid-back lifestyle in New Orleans' North Shore.

programme.title: Selling The Big Easy
programme.desc: Brittany searches the New Orleans suburbs to help a young family get the most for their money.

programme.title: Mash-Up Our Home
programme.desc: A couple tasks Kele and Christina with merging colourful, California mission flair into their home while staying true to its historic Tudor character.

programme.desc: A social media influencer is looking for a quirky place to call home in Orange County, California. Her at-home business needs are a priority.

programme.title: Bargain Block
programme.desc: Keith pays homage to Evan's impressive background in physics! He pushes the laws of nature and design to create a stunning and scientific dream home.

programme.desc: Kamohai and Tristyn tackle the renovation of a house in Kailua with an outdated '80s style, disgusting pool and a costly, failing retaining wall.
